sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59264" key="korwnistai/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κορων-ισταί</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n59264.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">singers of the crow-song</tr_>, title of work by Hagnocles, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> foreg.</sense> </entryFree>
